coverage_variable.physical_meaning: reacted fraction of available reaction sites

sticking_coefficient.definition: sticking probability toward the initial surface on which all reaction sites are still available

collision_flux.physical_meaning: molecular collision flux of precursor molecules to the surface
collision_flux.definition: mean thermal velocity (v_th) multiplied by gas-phase reactant density (n)

annotation.uncertainty_note: The term 'collision flux' is not explicitly used, but v_th and n are defined and their product functions as collision flux in the rate equation.

maximum_coverage.physical_meaning: maximum fraction of occupied adsorption sites

sticking_probability.definition: sticking probability toward the initial surface on which all reaction sites are still available

reaction_probability.definition: probability of reaction upon collision, directly proportional to the unreacted fraction of reaction sites (1 - θ)

annotation.uncertainty_note: The symbol s_0(1-θ) is derived from the text and equation, not explicitly given as a single symbol.

growth_per_cycle.physical_meaning: film thickness deposited per ALD cycle
growth_per_cycle.definition: A_0 (average area of an adsorption site) can be calculated from the growth per cycle

annotation.uncertainty_note: No explicit equation or symbol for GPC is provided, only its relation to A_0.

growth_relation.surface_growth_coupling: The thickness profile acquired after ALD is proportional to the coverage profile (θ).

reaction_dependencies.temperature_dependence: sticking probability of H2O increases with temperature (S00066, S00152, S00154, S00171, S00174, S00198)
reaction_dependencies.pressure_dependence: gas-phase reactant density (n) is dependent on process pressure/dose (S00097, S00101, S00143)

damkohler_number.physical_meaning: ratio between the reaction rate and diffusion rate

reaction_regime.rate_limiting_step: Can be reaction-limited or diffusion-limited depending on the Damkohler number (α); extraction method focuses on regimes where reaction rate influences penetration depth.
reaction_regime.reaction_order: First-order with respect to available reaction sites (1-θ) and gas-phase reactant density (n).
reaction_regime.coverage_dependence: Reaction rate decreases as surface coverage (θ) increases, due to the (1-θ) term.

boundary_coupling.transport_reaction_coupling: The surface reaction term acts as a sink in the gas-phase reactant density transport equation (E00001).

source_reference.paper_title: Sticking probabilities of H2O and Al(CH3)3 during atomic layer deposition of Al2O3 extracted from their impact on film conformality
source_reference.notes: The model is a simplified irreversible Langmuir model used to extract initial sticking probabilities from thickness profiles in high-aspect-ratio structures.
